Dose Optimization

Design Methods

Phase II designs:

  • BOP2
    • BOP2 with TITE endpoint
    • BOP2 Online Shiny App
    • BOIN+BOP2
  • BOP2-DC
  • Two-arm BOP2 (supp, code available)
  • BOP2-Comb (supp)
  • BOP2-FE (supp)
  • TOP (supp)
  • DODII
  • M-DODII

Phase I/II designs:

  • Toxicity + Efficacy:
    • MERIT
  • Toxicity + Efficacy + PK/PD:
    • DROID (supplementary)
    • BOIN-PK
    • CRM-PK
    • PEDOOP
  • Multi-Categorical + Multi Grade Outcomes:
    • A Generalized Phase I/II Dose Optimization Trial Design With Multi-Categorical and Multi-Graded Outcomes (supplementary)
  • Dynamic Borrowing:
    • (BOIN-MEM) BOIN-MEM: A Two-Stage Design for Dose Optimization With Information Borrowing Across Dose Levels and Stages in Oncology Phase I/II Trials (supp)

Phase II/III designs:

  • Seamless Phase 2-3 design

Summary Papers

  • Statistical and Practical Considerations in Planning and Conduct of Dose Optimization Trials
  • Dose optimization during drug development: whether and when to optimize

Unclassified papers

  • (U-MET) U-MET: Utility-Based Dose Optimization Approach for Multiple-Dose Randomized Trial Designs
  • (Comb-BOIN12) Comb-BOIN12: A Utility-Based Bayesian Optimal Interval Design for Dose Optimization in Cancer Drug-Combination Trials
  • (gBOIN-ETI) A generalized Bayesian optimal interval design for dose optimization in immunotherapy
  • Practical Bayesian guidelines for phase IIB clinical trials (Thall and Simon 1994)
  • Dose Optimization for Novel Oncology Agents: Design Options and Strategies
  • A generalized phase 1-2-3 design integrating dose optimization with confirmatory treatment comparison
  • Statistical and practical considerations in planning and conduct of dose-optimization trials
  • Seamless phase 2:3 design for trials with multiple co-primary endpoints using Bayesian predictive power
  • Design Strategy and Consideration for Oncology Dose-Optimization: An Industry Perspective
  • Design and sample size determination for multiple-dose randomized phase II trials for dose optimization
  • (FDA) Dosage Optimization: A Regulatory Perspective for Developing Oncology Drugs
  • (PKIDS) PKIDS: A Bayesian pharmacokinetics integrated phase I–II design to optimize dose-schedule regimes (supplementary)
  • BARD: A seamless two-stage dose optimization design integrating backfill and adaptive randomization
  • (COOP) A Bayesian latent-subgroup platform design for dose optimization (supp, code available)
  • (ROMI) ROMI: a randomized two-stage basket trial design to optimize doses for multiple indications (supp, code available)
  • (COCA) COCA: a randomized Bayesian design integrating dose optimization and component contribution assessment for combination therapies (R package)
  • (DEMO) DEMO: DOSE EXPLORATION, MONITORING, AND OPTIMIZATION USING BIOLOGICAL AND CLINICAL OUTCOMES

Short Courses

  • 2025 RISW Dose Optimization Short Course
Biostatistics
Dynamic Borrowing
